title: Corn Fritters
description: A crispy and spicy corn fritter recipe perfect for a snack or side dish. These fritters are made with corn, flour, and a touch of spice.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and 1/2 teaspoon of salt.
Add the corn to the flour mixture and stir until well combined.
Heat about 1/2 inch of fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the corn mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and sprinkle with a pinch of salt.
